zh.lifeSummary: 當Arthur Hathaway於大約1631年出生在英國時，他的父親Arthur Hathaway27歲，母親Mrs Arthur Hathaway26歲。他於1652年11月20日與Sarah Cooke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1656年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼且在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼達特姆斯住了大約17年。他去世於1711年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arthur Hathaway于大约1631年出生在英国时，他的父亲Arthur Hathaway27岁，母亲Mrs Arthur Hathaway26岁。他于1652年11月20日与Sarah Cooke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1656年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼且在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼達特姆斯住了大约17年。他去世于1711年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hathaway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Hatewi (Old English Heathuwīg), or from ancient Germanic Hathuwic, Hadewic, all ‘war’ + ‘war, battle’.
topographic name for someone who lived at or near a road across a heath, from Middle English he(a)th ‘heath’ + wei(e) ‘way’ (Old English hǣth + weg).

variants.name: Hardaway
meanings: English (London): probably a variant of   Hathaway  . This surname is now rare in Britain. In the US, this surname is concentrated in the south, in TX, TN, and GA.
Perhaps an Americanized form of German Hardeweg, a habitational name composed of ‘hard, paved’ + ‘way, road’.

variants.name: Hattaway
meanings: English: variant of   Hathaway  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Hathway
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): variant of   Hathaway  .

variants.name: Adaway
meanings: English: variant of Hathaway , with loss of initial H-.

nameMeanings.name: Arthur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin. King Arthur was a British king of the 5th or 6th century, about whom virtually no historical facts are known. He ruled in Britain after the collapse of the Roman Empire and before the coming of the Germanic tribes, and a vast body of legends grew up around him in the literatures of medieval Western Europe. His name is first found in the Latinized form Artorius; it is of obscure etymology. The spelling with -th- was popular among the gentry families of West Yorkshire in the late 1400s, even before Henry VII , who may have hoped to capitalize on the legend, gave the name to his son. It remained in regular use in some areas and its popularity exploded in the early 19th century, largely as a result of the fame of Arthur Wellesley ( 1769–1852 ), Duke of Wellington, the victor at the Battle of Waterloo and subsequently prime minister. Further influences were Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859–85 ), and the widespread Victorian interest, especially among the Pre-Raphaelites, in things medieval in general and in Arthurian legend in particular.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Arthur Hathaway was born about 1631, in England, his father, Arthur Hathaway, was 27 and his mother, Mrs Arthur Hathaway, was 26. He married Sarah Cooke on 20 November 1652, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1656 and Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America for about 17 years. He died on 11 December 1711, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arthur Hathaway est né environ 1631, à Angleterre, son père, Arthur Hathaway, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Arthur Hathaway, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Cooke le 20 novembre 1652, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1656 et à Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 17 ans. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1711, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arthur Hathaway um 1631 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arthur Hathaway 27 und seine Mutter Mrs Arthur Hathaway 26. Er hat am 20. November 1652 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Cooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1656 hat er in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt, und ungefähr 17 Jahre lang hat er in Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1711 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur Hathaway è nato il circa 1631 nel England, il suo padre, Arthur Hathaway, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Arthur Hathaway, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Cooke il 20 novembre 1652, nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1656 e nel Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America per circa 17 anni. Morì il 11 dicembre 1711, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Arthur Hathawayが約1631年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Arthur Hathawayは27歳，母Mrs Arthur Hathawayは26歳であった。1652年11月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーでSarah Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1656年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーダルトモウスに約17年間住んでいた。彼は1711年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで81歳で死去した。

ko.Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 더르트모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Arthur Hathaway(이)가 대략 1631년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arthur Hathaway(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Arthur Hathaway(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1652년 11월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서 Sarah Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1656년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서, 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 더르트모우스에서 약 17년 동안 살았다. 그는 1711년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur Hathaway nasceu aproximadamente 1631, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Arthur Hathaway, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Arthur Hathaway, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Cooke em 20 de novembro de 1652, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1656 e em Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America por quase 17 anos. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1711, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arthur Hathaway родился около 1631 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Arthur Hathaway было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Arthur Hathaway, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Cooke 20 ноября 1652 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1656 году и в местности дартмоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика около 17 лет. Он умер 11 декабря 1711 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arthur Hathaway nació aproximadamente 1631, en Inglaterra, su papá, Arthur Hathaway, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Arthur Hathaway, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sarah Cooke el 20 de noviembre de 1652, en Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1656 y en Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 17 años. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1711, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 81 años.
